why: Protocol 775 Play clientbound minecraft:block_event must dispatch from the official framed packet id to a ClientboundBlockEventPacket-compatible decoder through Stevenarella packet_by_id. This is packet-support evidence only and is separate from block event semantics, note block behavior, world/chunk state, initialized game state, spawn readiness, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
what: The Rust oracle test play_block_event_clientbound_framed_dispatch_matches_official_oracle_answer did not compile because Stevenarella had no Packet::PlayBlockEventClientbound variant for the official Play clientbound block_event surface. The current v26_1_2.rs Protocol 775 Play clientbound table maps minecraft:bundle_delimiter / 0x00 through minecraft:block_entity_data / 0x06, but not minecraft:block_event / 0x07.

play_clientbound_block_event.official_fixture: official ClientboundBlockEventPacket BlockPos, built-in Blocks.NOTE_BLOCK, event type, and event data constructor fixture; requires bootstrapped built-in registries but no initialized Level, BlockEntity, or game state
play_clientbound_block_event.official_body_shape: block position encoded with RegistryFriendlyByteBuf BlockPos, event type encoded as one unsigned byte, event data encoded as one unsigned byte, and block encoded with ByteBufCodecs.registry(Registries.BLOCK)

evidence.summary: Generated from official client.jar direct calls: ClientboundBlockEventPacket(BlockPos, Block, int, int), ClientboundBlockEventPacket.STREAM_CODEC, RegistryFriendlyByteBuf.readBlockPos/writeBlockPos, RegistryFriendlyByteBuf.readUnsignedByte/writeByte, ByteBufCodecs.registry(Registries.BLOCK), BuiltInRegistries.BLOCK, GameProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.details().listPackets(...), GameProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.bind(RegistryFriendlyByteBuf.decorator(RegistryAccess.fromRegistryOfRegistries(BuiltInRegistries.REGISTRY))).codec().encode/decode(...), and ClientGamePacketListener.handleBlockEvent(ClientboundBlockEventPacket).
Manifest declares the exact Rust oracle test and framed_dispatch_decode comparison surface.
Rust test reads the manifest and answer, splits official framed VarInt packet id from body bytes, and calls packet::packet_by_id for Play clientbound block_event dispatch.
Current Protocol 775 Play clientbound mapping has official packet ids 0x00 bundle_delimiter through 0x06 block_entity_data, but not official packet id 0x07 block_event.
Current Packet enum has no Play block_event packet variant matching the official 26.1.2 BlockPos, event byte, event data byte, and block registry id body fixture.

observed_failure: error[E0599]: no variant or associated item named `PlayBlockEventClientbound` found for enum `Packet`
